title: RsaRawOp enum values inverted vs wolfCrypt RSA_* constants
description: RsaRawOp::PrivateEncrypt=0, PrivateDecrypt=1, PublicEncrypt=2, PublicDecrypt=3 but wolfCrypt defines RSA_PUBLIC_ENCRYPT=0, RSA_PUBLIC_DECRYPT=1, RSA_PRIVATE_ENCRYPT=2, RSA_PRIVATE_DECRYPT=3 (wolfssl/wolfcrypt/rsa.h). Every discriminant is misnamed: calling RsaRawOp::PrivateEncrypt invokes RSA_PUBLIC_ENCRYPT at the C layer, and RsaRawOp::PublicEncrypt invokes RSA_PRIVATE_ENCRYPT. All four names are swapped relative to the actual operation performed.
